name: @simpill/image-ai-generatored-cli
description: Image AI toolkit monorepo: core SDK, CLI, and prompt discovery web UI

scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspaces --if-present 2>/dev/null; rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules
scripts.image: npm run cli:build --silent && npm run cli -- generate
scripts.batch-sprites: npm run cli:build --silent && npm run cli -- generate
